root_unique.description: Graph must have exactly one root node
root_unique.rule: count nodes where node.id == graph.root_id must equal 1

no_bare_loops.rule: detect cycles in edges, filter out cycles containing control nodes, count must be 0

valid_node_references.description: All edge from_node/to_node must reference existing nodes
valid_node_references.rule: for every edge, from_node and to_node must exist in graph.nodes

valid_port_references.description: Edge ports must exist in corresponding node's inputs/outputs
valid_port_references.rule: for every edge, from_port must exist in from_node.outputs and to_port must exist in to_node.inputs

same_node_param.description: Multiple edits to same node parameter: last operation wins

same_port_edge.description: Multiple edges connecting same ports: first creation wins, later rejected

double_remove.description: Removing same node/edge twice: second operation is no-op

remove_then_edit.description: Remove followed by edit on same entity: remove wins, edit rejected

edit_then_remove.description: Edit followed by remove on same entity: remove wins, edit discarded

rewrite_rules.placeholder: Rewrite rules will be populated in Phase 6

examples.name: eliminate_harmless_fork
examples.pattern: FORK(A) + MERGE where A has no side effects

examples.name: constant_folding
examples.description: Fold constant nodes into downstream nodes
